title: Truthful pod VRAM/RAM in the status-bar memory monitor
description: DONE + LIVE-VERIFIED on an L4 Pod (2026-06-16). Status-bar memory monitor now shows truthful Pod VRAM/RAM in remote mode via the wrapper's GET /wrapper/stats (in-Pod nvidia-smi VRAM + cgroup RAM), app /remote/pod/stats prefers the wrapper over the RunPod REST guess, MpiMemoryMonitor is mode-aware with a 'Pod N/A' fallback. Shipped in image v0.4.4 / wrapper 0.2.7 (cgroup-v1 RAM fix: RunPod Pods are v1; v0.4.2/0.4.3 read v2-only -> RAM null). Verified live: RAM 0.7 idle -> 22.6 under load, VRAM tracks gen, both match the RunPod console (app is fresher). Also shipped taesd vae_approx preview prebake (previews now crisp). Remaining cosmetic (separate backlog, NOT this card): app bar TOTAL uses the connection-feed spec (24GB VRAM / 62GB RAM) instead of the wrapper's true totals (22.5GiB / 57.74GiB); used values are correct. mpi-ci 9dc17b9, app b17cc64. See brief.md.
activeSessionTitle: Investigation + implementation: truthful remote memory monitor
